flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-4911: 'You didn't respect her allergies. I had to have my lawyer send you a letter to get you to stop subjecting her to them' | ROW-4912: 'You were fine subjecting her to it even though she needed her inhaler. Didn't stop until my lawyer sent you a letter' | ROW-5037: 'You have to pay that according to the court order not whenever you feel like it'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Two signal elements. SIGNAL 1 — ROW-4911-4912: Prior lawyer-letter citation as compliance leverage. Melissa references a past instance where she had her lawyer send Eli a formal letter to enforce compliance on Olivia's allergy accommodations. This functions as both a retrospective enforcement reminder ('I have used my lawyer against you before') and a prospective threat ('I will do it again if needed'). The pattern of citing past legal actions to create present compliance pressure is part of the established ADD-002 arc. Sev-1 (compliance history reference; no new threat action). SIGNAL 2 — ROW-5037: Court-order compliance demand ('according to the court order not whenever you feel like it'). Eleventh instance of court-order citation as compliance pressure. Sev-1.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-5127: 'Abby preggers?' — 7th predation framing (ADD-001: RF-04+RF-15 primary, RF-05 peripheral aggressive-tone).

flagged_messages.context_notes: B-014 is a relatively low-conflict batch (0.12). The prior-lawyer-letter references confirm Melissa's pattern of legal enforcement beyond just verbal threats — she has actually sent formal legal correspondence about co-parenting conduct.
flagged_messages.quote_excerpt: 'I had to have my lawyer send you a letter to get you to stop' (ROW-4911)

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF05-001 ACTIVE. B-014 confirms the arc extends beyond verbal threats to prior formal legal correspondence.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-014 (Mar-May 2024): Low-signal RF-05 batch. The prior lawyer-letter reference is significant context but adds little new threat language. The arc continues at Sev-1 maintenance level.
